title: PlumbingFixtureFlow
description: PlumbingFixtureFlow: Flow properties of a plumbing fixture

ClothesWasherVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a clothes washer per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

DishWasherVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a dish washer per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

KitchenFaucetAssumedUse.description: Duration of use measured in seconds. Property has a quantity of type Time meassured in [s].

KitchenFaucetVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a kitchen faucet per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

LavatoryAssumedUse.description: Duration of use measured in seconds. Property has a quantity of type Time meassured in [s].

LavatoryVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a lavatory per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

ShowerVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a people washer per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

ShowerAssumedUse.description: Duration of use measured in seconds. Property has a quantity of type Time meassured in [s].

ToiletVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a toilet per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

UrinalVolumePerUse.description: Volume of fluid supplied to a urinal per use through the plumbing fixture. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
